summary: Tested UI fixes (dark + button), BackButton on landing pages, editable/deletable comments API, HispaloStories editor features, and quick reactions regression. All features PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: UI FIX VERIFIED: BottomNavBar.js line 301 - + button uses bg-[#1C1C1C] (dark), computed style rgb(28, 28, 28), NOT green/emerald
UI FIX VERIFIED: InfluencerLandingPage.js line 9 imports BackButton, line 54 uses <BackButton /> after Header
UI FIX VERIFIED: SellerLandingPage.js line 8 imports BackButton, line 42 uses <BackButton /> after Header
UI FIX VERIFIED: CheckoutSuccessPage.js line 8 imports BackButton, line 72 uses <BackButton /> after Header
API VERIFIED: Edit comment with empty text returns 400
API VERIFIED: Edit/Delete nonexistent comment returns 404
API VERIFIED: Delete comment without auth returns 401/403
CODE VERIFIED: SocialFeed.js CommentItem component has edit-comment-{id} and delete-comment-{id} data-testids (lines 530, 534)
CODE VERIFIED: SocialFeed.js CommentItem shows edit/delete buttons on hover via group-hover opacity transition (line 523)
CODE VERIFIED: CommentItem editing state shows input field with save/cancel buttons (lines 506-511)
CODE VERIFIED: HispaloStories.js has DraggableOverlay component at line 263
CODE VERIFIED: HispaloStories.js placedStickers state (line 312) is array, addSticker pushes to array enabling multiple stickers
CODE VERIFIED: HispaloStories.js textOverlays state (line 311) is array, addTextOverlay pushes to array enabling multiple text overlays
CODE VERIFIED: HispaloStories.js Publish button uses bg-[#1C1C1C] at line 501, verified rgb(28,28,28)
API VERIFIED: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/react with {emoji:'clap'} returns {reacted:bool, emoji:'clap'}
CODE VERIFIED: CustomerOverview.js has data-testid='quick-actions' with overflow-x-auto class at line 86 (horizontal scrollable)

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 test used wrong dashboard endpoint)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified via Playwright and code review)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 verified all requested features: (1) + button is DARK bg-[#1C1C1C] not green - verified via Playwright computed style, (2) BackButton added to InfluencerLandingPage, SellerLandingPage, CheckoutSuccessPage - all visible in UI tests, (3) PUT /api/comments/{id} and DELETE /api/comments/{id} work correctly with proper auth checks, (4) CommentItem shows edit/delete on hover with proper UI flow, (5) HispaloStories has DraggableOverlay, placedStickers array, textOverlays array for multiple overlays, Publish button is dark, (6) Quick reactions POST /api/posts/{id}/react still works (regression PASS), (7) CustomerOverview quick-actions is horizontal scrollable.

features_verified.dark_plus_button: PASS - bg-[#1C1C1C] with rgb(28,28,28) computed style, no green/gradient
features_verified.comment_edit_mode_ui: PASS - Shows input with save/cancel buttons
features_verified.hispalostories_draggable_overlay: PASS - DraggableOverlay component exists at line 263
features_verified.hispalostories_multiple_stickers: PASS - placedStickers is array, addSticker pushes new items
features_verified.hispalostories_multiple_text_overlays: PASS - textOverlays is array, addTextOverlay pushes new items
features_verified.hispalostories_publish_button_dark: PASS - bg-[#1C1C1C] at line 501, verified rgb(28,28,28)

playwright_verification.homepage_bottomnav: Dark + button visible at bottom center
playwright_verification.checkout_success: BackButton visible, payment processing indicator shown
playwright_verification.story_upload_modal: Upload Story modal opens, publish button is dark rgb(28,28,28)
